AN EF1 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN ON LITTLE WHITE OAK ROAD UPROOTING SEVERAL TREES, AND TEARING OFF A LARGE SECTION OF THE ROOF OF A HOME AND DESTROYING THE ADJACENT GARAGE. RESIDENTS OF THE HOME WITNESSED THE TORNADO AS IT WAS MOVING ACROSS A FIELD TOWARD THE HOUSE. THE TORNADO CAUSED ADDITIONAL TREE DAMAGE AS IT CONTINUED NORTH UP THE NEXT RIDGE AND THEN ONTO CUB RUN ROAD.
